reviewsList.name: brina
reviewsList.comment: Love it nice night light under cabinet will buy again

reviewsList.name: swoods
reviewsList.comment: Looks good under cabinet but when using buttons to change choices of light it keeps falling down because magnets don't hold well. Also needs to be charged too often for my preference.

reviewsList.name: DD
reviewsList.comment: These lights are great! The eye is very sensitive and I like the different color choices. They are bright. I do have to charge them probably once every few weeks but I’m in the kitchen often. They’re easy to charge and they charge very fast. Definitely would recommend.

reviewsList.name: Luly Rocal
reviewsList.comment: Tamaño perfecto, se vé fácil de instalar.... Me gustó mucho... Aún no lo instalo para poner a prueba la duración de la batería.

reviewsList.name: back
reviewsList.comment: Really light weight and easy to install. Lights look beautiful. We will see how long the adhesive holds up on the magnetic strip that hold up the lights. I bought 4. UPDATE! I bought 2 more because these are fantastic! Wish I had more guitars just so I could shine these lights on!

reviewsList.name: use 2d
reviewsList.comment: I like everything about these lights.

reviewsList.name: strong
reviewsList.comment: These under cabinet lights are amazing...I looked at several other brands that looked like garage lights..these are easy to install by strong magnets and come with rechargeable USB plug! No more constant battery charging! And they are motion sensors! Buying 4 more for whole kitchen!

reviewsList.name: lucy
reviewsList.comment: I installed this in my closet. I get up and dressed earlier than my husband. So I don’t have to turn on the light and wake him up.

reviewsList.name: k
reviewsList.comment: Super easy to install. Nice soft light, but has 3 settings to make brighter! I will be getting 2 more for sure!

reviewsList.name: Nara
reviewsList.comment: I love how easy it was to install and how easy to recharge. Love the different lighting and option to leave on motion or turn on and off by self

reviewsList.name: Deb
reviewsList.comment: This small strip light bar is perfect, brightness, motion detection.... works great, I actually ordered more !!!
